hero.title: Magister
hero.subtitle: Cards
hero.body: A collectible art deck from the creative union of Magister (Alexander Zhilchik) and Dr.Klein — the studio name of painter Vasil Pochitsky — where mythology, alchemy, and history meet in one alternative universe.

quote.text: These are not cards you simply play with. They are artifacts — each one carries a world within it, waiting to be understood.

worlds_section.label: The Deck’s Mythology
worlds_section.title: Four worlds in fifty-four faces
worlds_section.lead: Magister is a full 54-card art deck. Suits are not decorative trim — each one is a realm with its own laws, cast, and symbolism. Ranks and houses are woven into the painting itself: you read the card by looking, not by corner indices.
worlds_section.footnote: Every illustration is a small narrative — portrait, emblem, and historical echo at once. Text on the site expands the frame; the cardboard remains the primary grimoire.

hearts.name: Hearts — Olympian gods
hearts.blurb: The classical pantheon in motion: desire, metamorphosis, oracle and flame. Hearts carry mythic episodes where mortals and immortals negotiate fate.

diamonds.name: Diamonds — Bearers of secrets
diamonds.blurb: Alchemical emissaries, hidden orders, and whispers behind crowns. Diamonds track those who traffic in knowledge that should not travel in plain sight.

clubs.name: Clubs — Knights Templar
clubs.blurb: Crusade steel, lost treasure-maps, and the long shadow of the order. Clubs anchor the deck in medieval intrigue and the arc from devotion to legend.

spades.name: Spades — Celebrities & icons
spades.blurb: Modern myth-making: faces the world thought it knew, reframed as archetypes. Spades ask what happens when public masks become permanent emblems.

gallery.label: The Collection
gallery.title: Figures of the Deck
gallery.hint: Hover to reveal. Click to enter.

artist.title: A creative union
artist.lead: Magister Cards is the work of Magister — Alexander Zhilchik — and Dr.Klein, Vasil Pochitsky’s artistic pseudonym.
artist.magister_bio: Creator of the characters and the deck’s mythos: businessman, philosopher, philanthropist — and, in his own way, a mystical figure.
artist.drklein_bio: Painter and illustrator. Dr.Klein is how Pochitsky signs this body of work — the hand behind all fifty-four images.
artist.process_intro: Two years from the first brief to the finished edition — every card earned its place as a painting before it became cardboard.
artist.process_body_1: Magister locked the cast, conflicts, and four suits as living worlds; Dr.Klein built each image on archives, emblem books, and alchemical reference — research long before pigment hit the panel.
artist.process_body_2: Sketches were not disposable thumbnails: every study was pushed toward a finished easel piece — composition, light, and surface treated as standalone art. Only then was the work adapted to the scale and rhythm of a playing card.
artist.process_body_3: The result is a deck you can frame or deal: museum-grade patience, table-ready rules — research, paint, play in one object.

footer.tagline: An art deck for those who prefer their worlds layered, their history alternative, and their cards carrying meaning.
footer.copy: © 2024 Magister Cards · Concept: Alexander Zhilchik (Magister) · Illustration: Vasil Pochitsky (Dr.Klein)
